privileged_info_summary: This is a synthetic healthcare record pipeline task with 6 JUnit tests in the com.healthcare.PatientRegistryTest class. Three real bugs are present in the implementation: (1) Patient.java's equals()/hashCode() methods only compare fullName and ignore dateOfBirth, causing records for same-named patients born on different dates to collide in the HashMap; (2) PatientRegistry.addRecord() catches and logs IllegalArgumentException from record.validate() but fails to re-throw it, causing validation failures to silently disappear; (3) DiagnosticCoder.isValidCode() lacks a null check before calling startsWith(), throwing NullPointerException instead of returning false when passed null. All three bugs are explicitly documented in inline code comments. The test class contains 6 tests: testAddAndRetrieveRecord (baseline), testPatientsWithSameNameButDifferentDOBAreDistinct (targets Bug 1), testAddingInvalidRecordThrowsException (targets Bug 2), testNullDiagnosticCodeReturnsFalseNotNPE (targets Bug 3), testValidIcd10CodeAccepted, and testInvalidIcd10CodeRejected. The project uses Maven with Java 11+ and JUnit 4.12.
